purpose: Normalize blocked, review-required, no-auth, unknown-resource, and unexpected states into machine-readable safe-stop and next-action guidance without human log interpretation.
core_law: The resolver is diagnostic-only, not an auto-repair tool.
A blocked state must explain why it stopped.
A review-required state must identify what kind of review or registry/policy update is needed.
A no-auth state must stop before mutation.
Unknown resources must request registry/routing-rule update instead of being ignored.
Unknown or future failure states must default to safe_stop_failure_triage_required.
Failure handling must not mutate website source, D1, R2, KV, Workers, Cloudflare, git, or deployment state.

status_families_non_exhaustive.continue_allowed_next_dry_run: Previous step is clean enough to proceed to the next dry-run stage only.
status_families_non_exhaustive.safe_stop_review_required: Stop safely and request review before mutation.
status_families_non_exhaustive.safe_stop_registry_update_required: Stop safely and update registry/routing rules before retry.
status_families_non_exhaustive.safe_stop_authorization_required: Stop safely because authorized intent context is missing.
status_families_non_exhaustive.safe_stop_failure_triage_required: Stop safely because hard failures, unsafe flags, or unknown/future failure states exist.

next_action_families_non_exhaustive.rerun_classifier: Run resource classifier again after input, registry, or rules change.
next_action_families_non_exhaustive.rerun_gate_plan: Run gate plan dry-run again after classifier or policy update.
next_action_families_non_exhaustive.update_resource_registry: Update Cloudflare Resource Registry or routing rules.
next_action_families_non_exhaustive.request_authorized_context: Ask for /blxst or verify scheduled/autonomous/controlled-deploy context.
next_action_families_non_exhaustive.fix_failed_step: Fix the reported failing step and rerun rehearsal.
next_action_families_non_exhaustive.triage_unknown_state: Triage a future or unrecognized status before continuing.
next_action_families_non_exhaustive.do_not_mutate: Do not write source/data/media/worker/deploy while unresolved.

hard_rules: Do not treat status families as exhaustive hardcoded truth.
Do not continue from unknown status by default.
Prefer safe stop over false confidence.
Resolver must not claim production readiness from planning-only success.
Real mutation, deploy, rollback, and recovery require separate rehearsals.
